header: Company History for polished people story
subheadline: Gives the people section a sharp editorial voice with credible roles, concise bios, and modern visual support.

events.title: Studio Title
events.description: A sharp, production-minded company history using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so candidates and partners can make the organization feel sharp, human, and credible.

events.title: Canvas Title
events.description: Built to show the company history with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

events.title: Insight Title
events.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this company history easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

events.title: Studio Title
events.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.
